name: 10q23_PTEN_region_SD
description: 10q23.31 segmental duplications flanking PTEN, KLLN, BMPR1A and the PTEN pseudogene PTENP1 (chr9). Intra- and interchromosomal SDs mediate recurrent 10q23 microdeletions linked to juvenile polyposis / Bannayan-Riley-Ruvalcaba / Cowden syndromes.

architecture.internal_structure: Two ~30-80 kb SD blocks flanking PTEN/BMPR1A at ~97% identity drive NAHR-mediated 10q23 microdeletion; PTENP1 pseudogene on 9p13 creates strong paralog confusion.
